---
title: "What Is a Hungry Fly?"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="coming-soon-page">
  <div class="coming-soon-inner">
    <span class="coming-soon-icon">🪰</span>
    <h1>What Is a Hungry Fly?</h1>
    <p class="coming-soon-sub">Contextualized ethomics and the DESTRA benchmarking framework.</p>
    <p class="coming-soon-note">Interactive demo coming soon &mdash; paper in revision.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```
